name: Levitation Simulator 2
short_description: Experience the mysterious mechanics of manipulation, meticulously crafted through countless experiments to maximize the sensation of levitation.
detailed_description:
Experience the mysterious mechanics of manipulation, meticulously crafted through countless experiments to maximize the sensation of levitation. This game is dedicated to those seeking a new gaming experience, embodying a deep and thoughtful exploration of what game controls can truly achieve.

Unlike its predecessor, Levitation Simulator 1, which required numerous physical control elements, Levitation Simulator 2 introduces an entirely new control mechanism. In this game, players must navigate their character using just a single key: the spacebar. Your journey to the destination relies solely on this one input.

Uncover the secrets behind this unique control system and make the most of extremely limited conditions. Place your fate in the spacebar as you transcend physical and timing-based controls to master all facets of your senses.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Czech, Dutch, Japanese, Korean, Polish, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Ukrainian
